general.title: TS Inter 1st and 2nd Year Results 2026: Official and unofficial websites to check Telangana intermediate marks memo
general.summary: The Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education (TGBIE) will announce the TS Inter Results 2026 for 1st and 2nd-year students today at 11:00 AM. Students can check their marks memo on both official and unofficial websites. The results are highly anticipated, as they will determine further educational opportunities for students in the state.

general.title: Okra Water for Diabetes: Does It Lower Blood Sugar?
general.summary: Okra water is becoming popular in India as a potential natural remedy for diabetes management. It is believed to aid in slowing sugar absorption and improving insulin sensitivity due to its soluble fiber and antioxidants. However, scientific evidence is limited, and it should not replace prescribed medication. Experts advise moderation and consulting a doctor before use.

general.title: Iran Says Talks With US Failed Due To Their "Unreasonable Demands"
general.summary: Iran announced that negotiations with the United States have stalled due to what it described as "unreasonable demands" from the U.S. This statement follows extensive discussions in Pakistan aimed at resolving the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. The Iranian delegation reportedly engaged in 21 hours of continuous and intensive negotiations before reaching an impasse.
